content:
Poe’s Raven Feather
Grants immunity from the next random debuff.


📜 Special Rule: The Mastery Exam Buffs
✔ Some weeks, the best item unlock allows a student to use a textbook in the Mastery Exam.
✔ A debuff may strip them of this ability if they fail a challenge.

✅ Why This Works:
• Ensures rewards impact actual coursework, not just the game.
• Forces students to think strategically about their choices.
• Encourages deeper investment in challenges beyond XP gains.

📜 4. The Class Legend System – Turning Boss Fights into Creative Assignments
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 236 (chunk 236/555)
